_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to construct a COA using available tools and techniques.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to design technical implementations that balance immediate delivery requirements with long-term maintainability, scalability, and operational sustainability.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-A-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-S-008 (AI, cosine: 0.390), AI-S-016 (AI, cosine: 0.371).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.4/10 (raw 0.339). Shared vocabulary: [ability]. DCWF-only terms [available, coa, construct, techniques, tools, using] vs WIDAI-only terms [balance, delivery, design, immediate, implementations, long] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.872 (P=0.889, R=0.855). P exceeds R by 0.034 — the DCWF element's 10 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Ability to construct a COA using available tools and techniques." and "Ability to design technical implementations that balance immediate delivery requ" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.395 > STS 0.339 (gap +0.055). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [ability] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.0%. Shared tokens: [ability]. DCWF-only: [available, coa, construct, techniques, tools, using]. WIDAI-only: [balance, delivery, design, immediate, implementations, long].
